general.max_dti: 55% standard; DTI >50% requires primary residence only, min 700 FICO, max 80% LTV/CLTV, no FTHB
general.io_available: Yes - max 80% LTV; 10yr IO / 20yr amort / 30yr maturity OR 10yr IO / 30yr amort / 40yr maturity

full_doc_methods: 1 Yr W-2s or Tax Returns (Full Doc - 12M)
alt_doc_methods: Asset Utilization (max 80% LTV, Purchase & R/T only)
income_doc.pnl_only_with_bank_statements: Max 80% LTV Purchase, Max 70% LTV Refinance
income_doc.pnl_only_without_bank_statements: Max 70% LTV Purchase, Max 60% LTV Refinance, Min FICO 720, Max $2.0MM Loan Amt
income_doc.self_employed_required: Must be S/E for 2 years for Alt Doc

other_details.cashout_appraised_value_seasoning: Appraised value w/ 6 month ownership seasoning allowed. Max 75% LTV and CDA or SSR of 2.5 or less required
other_details.subordinate_financing: Max CLTV = Grid Max LTV (Institutional seconds only)
other_details.seller_concessions: Up to 6% towards closing for all occupancies
other_details.assets: Sourced or seasoned for 30 days; Gift Funds allowed
other_details.credit_tradelines: Standard: 3 tradelines for 12+ months or 2 for 24+ months with activity in last 12 months or 1 mortgage/installment for 36+ months. Max 0x60x12. Waived if 3 bureau scores and FICO 700+
other_details.qualifying_fico: Middle score of 3 or lower score when only 2 agency scores provided, of primary wage earner
other_details.appraisal_lt_80_ltv: Clear Capital AVM or like product
other_details.appraisal_gt_80_ltv: Clear Capital CDA, Field Review, or FNMA CU Review w/ SRR score 2.5 or less
other_details.compliance: All applicable federal and state regulations; No Section 32 or state high cost
other_details.ineligible_geos_delegated: Primary & Second Home - NY; All Occupancies: HI lava zones 1 & 2; Investor: Baltimore City MD & Philadelphia PA
other_details.ineligible_geos_non_delegated: Primary & Second Home - NY; All Occupancies: HI lava zones 1 & 2; Investor: Baltimore MD & Philadelphia PA

income_doc.dscr_calc: DSCR = Gross Rents / PITIA (fully amortizing) or Gross Rents / ITIA (interest only loans)

str.restrictions: No First Time Investor / 2+ Unit / Rural / Unique Properties
str.purchase_income_source: AirDNA - min 60% Occupancy Rate. Property income = 80% of annual revenue / 12
str.operator_experience: Must document ST rental operator experience in last 12 months
str.refinance_requirement: Documented 12mo history of short term rental income

rural.allowed: Max 65% LTV, Purchase Only, Long Term Rent only, DSCR > 1.0x
rural.cfpb_check: If CFPB Rural/Underserved Designation indicates 'yes' then ineligible

citizenship.foreign_national: Eligible - Min DSCR 1.00x, max $1,500,000, 6 months PITIA reserves

other_details.ownership_seasoning_0_6mo: Lesser of Purchase Price + Improvements or Appraisal
other_details.rtl_renovation_cashout: Appraised value under 6mo ownership w/ 5% LTV reduction if SSR 2.5 or below
other_details.unleased_properties: Ineligible for R/T or C/O refinances
other_details.lease_income: Lesser of Form 1007 estimated market rent or lease. Higher lease rent with 3 months receipt. Lease in place required for all properties. Max 1 vacant unit for 2+ units
other_details.eligible_borrowers: LLC Entities: Domestic LLC required; US/Perm/Non-Perm/Foreign National guarantors allowed
other_details.credit_tradelines: 3 tradelines for 12+ months or 2 for 24+ months or 1 mortgage/installment for 36+ months. 0x60 in 12 months. Waived if 3 bureau scores and FICO 700+
other_details.qualifying_fico: Higher middle score of 3 scores or lower score of 2, of all borrowers/guarantors
other_details.appraisal: One full appraisal + CDA on all properties; CDA variance >10% = 2nd full appraisal; C5/C6 condition rating not acceptable
other_details.rural_dscr_requirements: Min DSCR 1.00, Min FICO 700, Long-Term Rental Only

note: WARNING: The overlays document (Deephaven vs TQL Guideline OVERLAYS.txt) suffered severe encoding corruption during PDF-to-text extraction. Most text is garbled Unicode. Below are all overlays that could be reliably reconstructed from readable fragments. A clean PDF re-extraction of the overlays document is recommended for complete accuracy.

expanded_prime.max_ltv_investment: Per matrix; no subordinate financing on investment
expanded_prime.pnl_with_2mo_bs: Max 80% LTV Purchase, Max 70% LTV Refinance; qualify off Alt Doc grids
expanded_prime.pnl_without_bs: Max 70% LTV Purchase, Max 60% LTV Refinance; Min FICO 720; Max $2.0MM
expanded_prime.asset_utilization: Max 80% LTV Full Doc Matrix; Purchase & R/T Only
expanded_prime.cashout_seasoning_lt_6mo: Max 75% LTV; CDA or SSR <= 2.5 required
expanded_prime.subordinate_financing: Max CLTV = Grid Max LTV; Institutional seconds only; No sub financing on investment
expanded_prime.dti_gt_50: Primary only; Min 700 FICO; Max 80% LTV/CLTV; No FTHB

dscr.str_allowed: Yes - Property Guard required; Min DSCR 1.15x; 5% LTV reduction (75% max); Min FICO 720; No FTI/2+Unit/Rural/Unique
dscr.str_purchase_airdna: 80% of annual revenue / 12; Min 60% Occupancy Rate
dscr.rural_dscr: Max 65% LTV; Purchase Only; Long-Term Rent only; DSCR > 1.0x; CFPB Rural check
dscr.foreign_national: Eligible; Max $1.5M; Min DSCR 1.00x; 6 months PITIA reserves
dscr.unleased_properties: Ineligible for R/T or C/O refi
dscr.rtl_renovation: Appraised value w/ SSR <= 2.5 under 6mo ownership; 5% LTV reduction

non_prime.pnl_only: 2 Mo BS required; Min FICO 660; Max 80% Purchase / 70% Refi

super_jumbo.valuation: Two full appraisals required; lower value used
super_jumbo.citizenship: US Citizens & Permanent Resident Aliens only

heloan_equity_advantage.io: Max CLTV 70%; FICO 700+; Primary only; 1st lien fully amortizing

general_tql_notes.investor_ineligibility_geos: Baltimore City MD & Philadelphia PA for investor occupancy loans (all first lien programs)
general_tql_notes.ny_ineligibility: Primary & Second Home in NY (delegated & non-delegated)
general_tql_notes.hi_ineligibility: HI lava zones 1 & 2 (all occupancies, all programs)
general_tql_notes.fraud_report: SDW/SDF required per current Verus/OnGenicy Seller Guide
general_tql_notes.declining_market: 5% LTV/CLTV reduction across all programs when appraisal indicates declining market
